questions.text: Please provide a brief description of your business or organisation and explain your interest in the Acquisition, including any commercial relationships with Calvary and/or Healthscope.
Do you have any concerns with the Acquisition? If so, please provide further details.

How closely do the following private hospitals compete with each other in the supply of private hospital services? In your response, you may wish to consider factors such as the services and specialities available at each hospital, medical officers, facilities, location, quality of care, safety, innovation and pricing. a. Calvary Lenah Valley Hospital and Hobart Private b. Calvary St John’s Hospital and Hobart Private.

Please list any other hospitals, including day surgeries, that compete with Calvary Lenah Valley, Calvary St John’s and/or Hobart Private. Please explain your response and identify any services or specialities in relation to which these hospitals and day surgeries compete closely.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
